rationale: Ukraine's continued territorial gains and logistics strikes are positive for Black Sea security but represent continuation, not a new qualitative shift; Iran deal stalemate has no direct impact on Romania this cycle.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Ukraine's ongoing advances reduce pressure on Romania's Black Sea flank, but this is a continuation of last cycle's trend with no new escalation or breakthrough.

top_events.title: France-Germany FCAS jet plans collapse: European defense autonomy questioned
top_events.summary: The failure of the Franco-German fighter program is a continued concern for EU defense capability, indirectly relevant to Romania as a NATO eastern flank member.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran-US deal stalemate means no near-term energy price relief for Romanian consumers; situation unchanged from prior cycles.
